[Download Now on Galaxy Store!]

Blue Archive, the top-trending role-playing mobile game, is now available on Galaxy Store!

Download now and dive deep into the world of Blue Archive!

https://apps.samsung.com/appquery/appDetail.as?appId=com.nexon.bluearchivegalaxy
